2 recent stories from BYD & ChangAn.
BYD delivered 50 dump trucks to the Zhengzhou land port zone & ChangAn delivered 5 105 tone wide dump trucks to Shaanxi project for transporting mining transport.

Improved eTech is allowing more https://t.co/oXWdAwi4je

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
There it is. BYD looking into building plant in Canada according to Bloomberg & also acquiring a more established automaker.

It's already growing really fast in global mkt, but acquiring an automaker w/ global presence would allow it to skip the long process of building up sales https://t.co/uouhqXMP56

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
FangChengBao Tai-3 lightning version have been launched: 153.8k for 620 km RWD & 169.8k for 565 km 4WD version. Compared to last yr, Tai-3 range & charging speed go significantly faster w/o px increase.

Comes w/ optional DiPilot-300 & CNOA support
or DiPilot-100 for base
4WD https://t.co/Uis35fs8CJ

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD added 358 new lightning charging stations in the past wk, for 4597 in total. It also formed partnership w/ JD to bring its 7Fresh Coffee & convenient stores into DiSpace -> 24/7 HQ customer experience during charging.

Goal is to make charging experience more like re-fueling https://t.co/y2USEZbkJs

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Helium import for China from 2022 to 2025 by volume & %. Notice the huge jump in red/Russia to 50% by end of last yr while US share disappeared after October Surprise.

China also loaded up on import in Nov/Dec just as Gulf situation heated up. Perfect timing. https://t.co/cYqTTqocYN https://t.co/yFrl3GYRo5

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD's goal is to eliminate need for ICE vehicles & that could only be achieved by not only shorter charging time but also less wait + lower cost.

1 yr free charging for new owners.
Customers need to be able to charge to full vs 80%
Faster throughput -> less wait time https://t.co/jHhS3RjRtt

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
How to remove the negative perception of charging vs refueling?
1st you have to cut down that time in both warm & cold weather -> 9min charging to full or 5min to 70%. 800 km range after that.

Low cost - 1.5 RMB/kWh vs 2-2.49 for other fast chargers
Plentiful - 20000 stations https://t.co/EEuhf4SpTi

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD has also started taking pre-order for Tai-7 EV w/ px range of (220-250k RMB). Normally, launch px will be lower.

i also wonder if Tai-7 DM-i will also get Blade 2.0 upgrade. https://t.co/2nQ9c9UfKj

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
SRAM scaling & dark silicon remain the biggest constraint in chip performance as logic cell dimensions continue to shrink.

So, 50% higher transistor density doesn't mean 50% improved performance. You can have larger die to have same compute, but it will also have higher power https://t.co/HSmhVR3aVi
